scope: N2-only pass435/pass434/pass376 original overlay/capture readiness evidence for movement/viewport/walls

problems: duplicate raw frames detected: 2 unique sha256 value(s) repeat

redmcsbAnchors: COMMAND.C:2045-2156 F0380 dispatches C001/C002 to F0365 and C003-C006 to F0366
CLIKMENU.C:142-174 F0365 mutates G0308_i_PartyDirection for accepted turns
CLIKMENU.C:180-347 F0366 resolves target square and calls F0267 for movement state
DUNGEON.C:1371 F0150 computes relative movement coordinates
LOADSAVE.C:1941-1943 loads initial party X/Y/direction from InitialPartyLocation
DUNVIEW.C:8318-8611 composes G0296 and presents via F0097
DRAWVIEW.C:709-858 resolves C007_ZONE_VIEWPORT and calls VIDRV_09_BlitViewPort
decision: The original route/capture blocker is route-state diversity/post-command state-delta evidence. The current route is executable but non-promotable because it repeats two raw frame hashes.
nonClaims: claim that original movement handlers are defective
